# **What is the solution?**

## Requirements overview (optional)

## User stories / User flow

## Requirements

1. User should be able to see the website of the Lending Partners of the LSP(Volt in this case) across the application journey (compliance observation)
2. User should be able to see the Grievance Redressal Officer of the Lending Partners of the LSP(Volt in this case) across the application journey (compliance observation)
3. Product information like interest rates and loan amount range should be visible on the app (compliance observation)
